questionHtml:
Which statement is incorrect for a 0.10 mol dm–3 HCOOH solution?

A. pH = 1

B. [H+] << 0.10 mol dm–3

C. [HCOO–] is approximately equal to [H+]

D. HCOOH is partially ionized

meta.title: Which statement is incorrect for a 0.10 mol dm–3 HCOOH solution? A. pH = 1 B. [H+] << 0.10 mol dm–3 C. [HCOO–] is approximately equal to [H+] D. HCOOH is partially ionized
